examples: Turn yourself into a breezy goddess by opting for the braided, crochet or beaded headband models.
It's a foldable headband that bends the earbuds right into your ears.
A spell from the Book of the Dead is inscribed on the headband, 1st century BC.
"You are very welcome, " says one woman, an English teacher with a purple headband and bicycle.
He tossed his headband toward the stands and celebrated as he walked to the locker room.
